unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I need to pay some money for the book.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音法：‘赔’。付款（pay）给别人赔偿。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We will have a wonderful holiday this summer.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拆分法：holi (好礼) + day (天) -> 假期送好礼的一天。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We have a happy activity in the summer camp.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音法：“看铺”。在度假营地看铺子。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can ride a bike very well.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拼读法：r像草，ide像“爱的”，骑着有爱的小车在草地上跑。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The young skier likes skiing in winter.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ski (滑雪) + er (人) = 滑雪者。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The fresh air makes us feel happy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音法：“哎呀”。哎呀，这里的空气真新鲜！

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This word means good luck.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音法：“面包”。这个面包的意思是美味。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He is a British boy from England.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Brit (不热) + ish (鱼) -> 英国的鱼不怕热。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I buy a new pair of gloves.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音法：“配耳”。一双耳环要配耳朵。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There is a tall building near our school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: build (建造) + ing (名词后缀) = 建筑物。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The second day of a week is Tuesday.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sec (赛跑) + ond (温的) -> 赛跑得第二，喝杯温水。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Be careful! Don't fall down.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音法：“扶”。摔倒了（fall）需要别人扶。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I watch a funny film with my family.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音“非梦”。电影里的世界并非梦境。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: June is the sixth month of a year.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Jun (军) + e -> 军人在六月进行大阅兵。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There is a small hill behind our house.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: h (高) + ill (生病) -> 高高的小山上风大，容易生病。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We play games on the playground after school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: play (玩耍) + ground (地面) = 玩耍的地方，即操场。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We have an exciting activity in the mountain.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: active (积极的) + ity (名词后缀) = 活动。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There are one thousand people in our school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: thou (熟) + sand (沙子) -> 一千粒熟透的沙子。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The young man is a great hero.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: he (他) + ro (肉) -> 他是一身腱子肉的英雄。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We love beautiful nature very much.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: na (那) + ture (树儿) -> 大自然里有那万千树儿。
